title: Expensify vs Square
description: Compare Expensify vs Square in July 20. We analyzed features, pricing, user ratings, and real-world performance to help you choose the right finance & accounting tool.
verdict: After thorough evaluation, Square emerges as our recommendation for most users with a 4.3/5 rating compared to 4.2/5. However, the best choice depends on your specific needs. We recommend evaluating both tools against your requirements.

faqs.question: Which is better, Expensify or Square?
faqs.answer: Based on our detailed comparison, Square edges ahead with a 4.3/5 rating. Expensify excels at Expense management platform with receipt scanning and reporting., while Square is stronger for Square is a finance & accounting platform that helps Small Businesses and Retail.

faqs.question: What are the main differences between Expensify and Square?
faqs.answer: Expensify and Square differ in pricing ($5-9/mo vs Free – $79/mo), target audience, and feature focus. Our comparison table breaks down these differences.

faqs.question: Is Expensify cheaper than Square?
faqs.answer: Expensify starts at $5-9/mo while Square starts at Free – $79/mo. Consider total cost of ownership including implementation and training.

faqs.question: Which tool has better features, Expensify or Square?
faqs.answer: Both platforms offer strong features for finance & accounting. Square scores higher overall, but specific feature needs may favor one over the other.

faqs.question: Can I use Expensify and Square together?
faqs.answer: Many organizations use both tools for complementary purposes. However, for overlapping use cases, choosing one streamlines workflows.

faqs.question: Which is easier to use, Expensify or Square?
faqs.answer: Both Expensify and Square prioritize user experience. The best choice depends on your team's technical expertise and workflow preferences.

faqs.question: Which platform has better customer support?
faqs.answer: Both offer documentation and support tiers. The quality varies by plan level — check our detailed review for support comparisons.

faqs.question: Which finance & accounting tool is best for my team size?
faqs.answer: Enterprise features favor Expensify for large teams, while Square may be more suitable for smaller teams with its $5-9/mo pricing.
